outlook.summary: Dealers are heavily long gamma across all expiries, indicating a stable, range-bound market. The massive 26700 Monthly Call wall acts as a strict upper boundary, while 0DTE Max Pain at 26300 provides a lower anchor. Expect mean-reverting price action between these structural levels.
